description_long: This is a modern duplex house with two attached units, each featuring a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The front facade is characterized by vertical wooden slats accenting the entryways and large windows, while the rest of the exterior is finished in smooth white. Each unit has a private fenced backyard with green lawns, and the property is enclosed by a wooden fence on all sides. The driveway and walkways are paved, leading up to the main entrances, which are set back from the street. The rear of the house features expansive glass doors opening onto the backyard, maximizing natural light and indoor-outdoor flow. The overall design emphasizes minimalism, privacy, and functional outdoor space.
description: A modern, flat-roofed duplex house with white facades, vertical wooden accents, large windows, and private fenced backyards.
description_view_0: Front view showing two main entrances with vertical wooden slats, paved driveways, and landscaped front lawns.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the building, the wooden perimeter fence, and the separation between the two backyards.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large glass doors opening to spacious, private green backyards for each unit.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the plain white exterior walls and the continuation of the wooden fencing.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entryways with vertical wooden slats, paved approach, and minimal overhang
